item.title: Writing an Article for Twenty-Four Cents—My Experience Using Pi + DeepSeek as a Codex Backup Solution
item.author: xianpeng.shen@gmail.com (Xianpeng Shen)
item.description: Codex’s $22 monthly subscription fee and usage limits prompted me to seek a cheaper, stable, and always-ready backup solution. After an unsuccessful attempt with OpenCode, I turned to the Pi + DeepSeek combination. The result was a bit unexpected: writing an entire blog post cost only 0.24 RMB.
